calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-05-2008 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Judge Pro Tem: Sadhana Narayan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael Phelps, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Warren Jew, who was placed under oath and examined.
Vincent Jew, the plaintiff's father, was placed under oath and examined.
Daniel Piccinini, Esq. appeared with defendant Eduardo Mendez, who was placed under
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 19, 2008.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were placed on the record by Mr. Phelps.

(1) Plaintiff shall have judgment of possession of the subject premises located at 3436A 19th Street, San Francisco, CA 94127. (2) Writ of Possession shall not be acted upon provided all occupants move-out of the subject premises prior to 2/28/09 (3) Each party shall bear their own fees and costs. (4) Parties agree to a mutual release pursuant to Civil Code Section 1542. (5) Defendant's security deposit of $1,000.00 shall be forfeited. (6) Plaintiff shall tender $25,000.00 to defendant's counsel to establish a trust account. Defendant Eduardo Mendez shall determine how said money shall be divided. (6) Plaintiff shall pay Maria Yanez the sum of $5,000.00 by 01/15/09.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Warren Jew is present.
J. Michael Phelps, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Eduardo Mendez is present.
Daniel Piccinini, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.

Judge Pro Tem Wil Chen, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
